---
name: New Tool Request
about: Request a new EOS tool to be added to the MCP server
title: "[TOOL] "
labels: new-tool
assignees: ""
---

## Tool Name

`get_<name>` or `set_<name>`

## EOS Command(s)

The `show` or configuration commands this tool should wrap.

```
show ...
```

## Description

What this tool does and why it's useful for AI-assisted network operations.

## Tool Category

Which module should this tool belong to?
- [ ] device
- [ ] interfaces
- [ ] vlans
- [ ] routing
- [ ] switching
- [ ] monitoring
- [ ] config_mgmt
- [ ] troubleshoot
- [ ] security
- [ ] evpn_vxlan
- [ ] vrf
- [ ] bfd
- [ ] event_monitor
- [ ] Other: ___

## Expected Output

Example JSON output from the EOS command (if available).

```json
{
}
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, use cases, or relevant EOS documentation links.
